before.description: PlanTemplateDefinition.RequiredRules and TemplateCombinationDefinition.RulePack were two separate, exact-version, uncoordinated RulePack selections that could disagree.

after.masterNewField: RequiredRuleKeys: string[]? -- semantic key requirement only, never selects a version

schemaVersionExclusivity.mechanism: same as exact-workout-reference-migration.md (unified model + SchemaVersionShapeValidator + JSON Schema oneOf)

APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1.status: unchanged, reused by combination v4 -- no new RulePack version created since content unaffected

versionBumpIndependence: Proven: a RulePack version bump under the same key never requires touching the master's semantic requirement (RulePackOwnershipTests.ChangingOnlyRulePackVersion_DoesNotRequireChangingMaster_WhenKeyRemainsAcceptable)
classification: TECHNICAL_ONLY (architecture/ownership decision, not a domain-content decision)
